station_address: Sion - Trombay Rd, opposite Telecom Factory Road, Deonar, Chembur, Mumbai, Maharashtra 400088
text: Gas station is worst employees are so rude an very mannerles. Manager,owner no responsible were available at this pump. No separate line available for taxi and private cng car. No proper line management no air facilities overcharge in bill for CNG  (if bill amount is 6.2 rs they will charge 7 rs ) why boss. This will help for others who are middle class won't go here. I request to all of guys avoid this pump.

station_address: Sion - Trombay Rd, opposite Telecom Factory Road, Deonar, Chembur, Mumbai, Maharashtra 400088
text: Washroom review : It is behind the main petrol pump. There are 2 washrooms in all. Both washrooms are common for men n women. Washroom was reasonable clean but our fellow citizens who need some training in civic sense , forgot to flush or peed on the floor. Can't blame the management for it.
